name: Yunnan Energy New Material Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Energy New Material Co., Ltd. engages in the production, processing, and sale of plastic films, modified plastics, laser transfer paper, printing materials, cardboard, and liquid packaging paper in China and internationally. Its products include smoke film flat membrane products, such as special films, ordinary packaging with BOPP thin, and BOPP for cigarette packaging; liquid boxes, such as red creative packaging and liquid food packaging paper-based aluminum plastic products; and smoke standard products. The company's products also consist of special paper special films, including seamless plane red laser arcade aluminum, seamless platinum gold laser aluminum, ordinary golden alumina, seamless face laser transfer paper, red fiber frame paper, cross beam laser composite paper, aluminum foil, and transfer liner paper; and electrochemical aluminum, liner paper, frame paper series, and special paper series products. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Chuangxin New Material Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yunnan Energy New Material Co., Ltd. in October 2018. Yunnan Energy New Material Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Yuxi, China.
